title: Petco Health & Wellness (WOOF) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Petco Health & Wellness (WOOF) Q2 2023 Earnings Lag Estimates. Q2 2023 Results: Petco came out with quarterly earnings of $0.06 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.07 per share. This compared to earnings of $0.19 per share a year ago. Revenue Performance: The company posted revenues of $1.53 billion for the quarter ended July 2023, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.97%. This compared to year-ago revenues of $1.48 billion. Earnings Announcement: Petco Health and Wellness Company (NASDAQ:WOOF) was scheduled to announce Q2 earnings results on Thursday, August 24, 2023, before market open. Consensus Estimates: The consensus EPS Estimate was $0.06 (-68.4% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $1.52B (+2.7% Y/Y). Earnings Miss Analysis: While the company beat on revenue, the earnings miss indicated profitability challenges despite top-line growth.
